task_completion.description: Agent switches Google Earth to Moon view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Google Earth interface displays a lunar globe (grey cratered surface) or the planet selection toolbar shows 'Moon' is selected.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates the view to Tycho Crater
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewport is centered on a large crater with a prominent central peak. The status bar or coordinates display is near 43°S, 11°W.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the New Placemark dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Placemark' or 'Google Earth - New Placemark' dialog window is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct name for the placemark
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the placemark dialog contains the text 'Tycho Crater - Research Site'.

task_completion.description: Agent places the placemark at the correct coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Latitude/Longitude fields in the placemark dialog are approximately 43.31°S (or -43.31) and 11.36°W (or -11.36).

task_completion.description: Agent includes the crater diameter in the description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field in the placemark dialog contains the text '85 km' or '85km'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the placemark to My Places
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar (specifically under 'My Places') lists a new item labeled 'Tycho Crater - Research Site'.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the Google Earth Pro GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Google Earth Pro application window with standard menus, toolbar, and 3D viewer, not a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: Agent manually enters data rather than loading a pre-made file
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'New Placemark' dialog is visible with text being entered or the cursor active, rather than the result instantly appearing in the sidebar.

integrity.description: Agent determines coordinates/info via the tool or provided context, not by browsing for a solution image
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is focused on the Google Earth application window, not viewing a screenshot of a completed task in a web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Tycho Crater. Coordinates: 43.31°S, 11.36°W. Diameter: 85 km. Expected Placemark Name: 'Tycho Crater - Research Site'.
